$uid..validate: newData.exists() && newData.hasChildren(['id', 'name', 'surname', 'username', 'email', 'gezdiren', 'profileImage']) && newData.child('id').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('email').val() === auth.token.email && !newData.hasChild('password')

$advertId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerId').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('ownerId').val() === auth.uid && (!newData.exists() || newData.child('ownerId').val() === auth.uid)))
